landing.title: ResumeAI
landing.resetProgressMessage: This will permanently delete all your resume data from this device. You will have to start from scratch.
landing.craftedSubtitle: Stand out in the crowded job market with a resume that reflects your true potential. Our tools are built with modern design principles and AI intelligence.
landing.feature1Desc: Our AI analyzes job standards to optimize your bullet points and descriptions automatically.
landing.feature2Desc: Templates designed to be easily read by Applicant Tracking Systems of major global corporations.
landing.feature3Desc: Export your resume to a professional, high-resolution PDF with pixel-perfect precision.
landing.howItWorksDesc: Three simple steps to your dream job.
landing.step1Desc: Fill in your experience, education, and skills in our intuitive, dark-mode editor.
landing.step2Desc: Use our Magic Wand to refine your descriptions and make them stand out to recruiters.
landing.step3Desc: Get a pixel-perfect, ATS-friendly resume ready to send to top-tier companies.
landing.readySubtitleHasData: You're just a few steps away from a world-class resume.
landing.readySubtitleNoData: Join 10,000+ professionals using ResumeAI to accelerate their careers.
landing.btnCreateNow: Create Your Resume Now - It's Free
landing.footerText: © 2026 ResumeAI. Designed and Built by Lian.

hero.subtitleHasData: Success is persistent. Pick up exactly where you left off and finish your professional masterpiece.
hero.subtitleNoData: Effortlessly create professional, high-impact resumes with our AI-powered builder. Designed for the standards of top-tier companies.
